## beehiiv custom-fields update

Update a custom field

### Synopsis

Update custom field

Update a custom field on a publication

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/custom_fields/{id}

```
beehiiv custom-fields update <id> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv custom-fields update custom_field_123 --body @custom-field.json
beehiiv fields edit custom_field_123 --body '{"display":"Favorite Airport"}'
```

### Options

```
      --body string         Provide a request body as inline JSON, @path, or - for stdin
  -h, --help                help for update
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL

      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw

      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
